title: Bearing Capacity
description: Bearing Capacity Calculator using factor of safety approach.

drawing_type.description: Drawing. Symbol: Method. Drawing to display in center

method.description: Method. Symbol: Method. Method for analysis.

shape.description: Shape. Symbol: Shape. Shape of foundation.

drainage.description: Drainage. Symbol: Drainage. Drained assessment or undrained assessment.

B.description: B. Symbol: B. Units: m. Width of footing.

L.description: L. Symbol: L. Units: m. Length of footing.

D.description: D. Symbol: D. Units: m. Depth to bottom of footing from soil surface.

c.description: c. Symbol: c. Units: kPa. Effective soil cohesion.

c_u.description: cu. Symbol: c_u. Units: kPa. Undrained cohesion strength of soil.

c_a.description: ca. Symbol: c_a. Units: kPa. Adhesion between soil and base of foundation. Typically in range of 0.6 - 1.0 x soil cohesion.

phi.description: φ. Symbol: φ. Units: °. Effective internal friction angle.

gamma.description: γ. Symbol: γ. Units: kN/m3. Soil unit weight above water table.

gamma_l.description: γl. Symbol: γ_{l}. Units: kN/m3. Saturated unit weight.

D_w.description: Dw. Symbol: D_{w}. Units: m. Depth to water table.

q.description: q. Symbol: q. Units: kPa. Permanent surcharge load at surface level adjacent to footing resisting bearing failure (note that variable is not available as an option since q is always favorable for bearing and a factor of 0 would be applied to such a load).

beta.description: β. Symbol: β. Units: °. Base on slope or adjacent to slope.

eta.description: η. Symbol: η. Units: °. Tilted base angle.

bearing_factor.description: SFbearing. Symbol: SF_{bearing}. Factor of Safety for Bearing Resistance.

sliding_factor.description: SFstability. Symbol: SF_{stability}. Factor of Safety for Sliding & Overturning Resistance.

sensitivity.description: Parameter. Choose a variable to run a sensitivity analysis on if required. This will graph how variations in the chosen variable effect the bearing capacity.

sensitivity_min.description: Min. Symbol: min. Minimum value for sensitivity analysis.

sensitivity_max.description: Max. Symbol: max. Maximum value for sensitivity analysis.

steps.description: Data Points. Number of data points for sensitivity analysis.

alpha_1.description: α1. Symbol: α_1. Exponent for Hansen inclination factor (iq).

alpha_2.description: α2. Symbol: α_2. Exponent for Hansen inclination factor (iγ).

friction_ratio.description: δ / φ. Symbol: δ / φ. Ratio between external friction angle (δ) and internal friction angle (φ).

passive_resistance.description: Passive Sliding Resistance. Symbol: H_p. Units: kN. Passive resistance to consider in sliding assessment.

show_net_bearing.description: Show qu,net. Whether to show the net bearing pressure as defined in DAS 'factor of safety' section.

uid.description: Calculator unique identifier — must match the endpoint uid.

current_unit_system.description: Unit system for input values and output display.

project_details.description: Optional project metadata for the PDF report header.
